title: Allow Pasting Images (screenshots) into Workforms - Upload File Dropzone
excerpt:

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use multiple workforms that have the upload file dropzone. It would be unbelievably handy if these dropzones supported paste function.

The use case is I have an image as part of the form submission. I have the image in my clipboard as part of a screenshot tool (Greenshot).

When I click into the Workform, which contains an upload file dropzone, and click Contrl + V - nothing happens. Many other dropzones this would paste as a file attachment.

This versus the user has to save the screenshot - navigate to the screenshot and drag n drop into the dropzone - the ability to paste offer a much simpler / quicker way of the same end results.

posts.author: jpegweber (Jacob)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be incredibly useful for my team.
